message:
fix: dolt_remotes patrol correctly disabled when config is nil

IsPatrolEnabled(nil, "dolt_remotes") was returning true because the nil-config
early return fired before the dolt_remotes-specific default. Moved the opt-in
check ahead of the nil-config fallback so dolt_remotes is always disabled
unless explicitly enabled in daemon.json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
